summary: All code_refs and both source figures resolve correctly. One soft MISCITE: the note's 'AWS supports <phoneme> via lexicon_names' conflates a Polly SSML capability (not emitted in the cited _construct_ssml code, which only produces <speak>/<lang>/<prosody>) with lexicon_names (which IS in code, def 135-142, usage :345). Lexicons and <speak> are fully supported; <phoneme> is not shown in the cited lines. No WRONG claims.
